chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Criminal Bail Application No.1663 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATUREs OF JUDGEs For hearing of bail application --------------------------------------------- 30.01.2026 Mr. Muhamamd Anees & Mareena, applicants for applicant Mr. Sharafuddin Kanhar, A.P.G. ------------------------------------ Learned counsel for applicant after arguing the matter at some length does not press the instant criminal bail application and seeks direction to the trial Court to decide the case of the applicant preferably within a period of four months. Learned A.P.G. has recorded no objection on such proposal. In view of above, instant criminal bail application is dismissed as not pressed, with direction to the learned trail Court to decide the case of the applicant preferably within a period of four months. J U D G E Gusher/PS
